what_was_built: tools/crypto_d1_backtest_runner.py (stdlib-only Python runner; CLI run / validate-config / show-plan; CSV loader with full row-level validation; 4 primary strategy families + benchmark + 1 additive-filter experiment + WATCH-only mean-reversion skip; cost + slippage model with bounded CLI overrides; IS/OOS split; metrics; PASS/WATCH/FAIL classifier; deterministic JSON+MD report emitter)

tests/test_crypto_d1_backtest_runner.py (38 tests covering: stdlib-only AST scan; no-network / no-broker / no-exchange / no-credentials / no-subprocess; no order-placement / paper / live trading code; validate-config bounds; show-plan emits required fields; missing/empty data dir fails safely; valid BTC-only and BTC+ETH+SOL runs; OHLC / duplicate / negative-volume / missing-close / missing-header rejections; benchmark presence; MA / momentum skip-with-reason on insufficient history; mean-reversion WATCH-only; cost applied on trades; CLI bounds; IS/OOS fields; safety flags pinned False; report MD says research-only; report files land at out_dir; determinism on same input; no real data files committed under bundle dir or data/crypto_d1_research/)
files_NOT_changed: tools/strategy_candidate_registry.py (NOT modified -- the runner is code, not evidence; promotion to ACTIVE requires a future per-strategy PASS verdict + operator decision)
tools/strategy_next_bundle.py (NOT modified -- no artificial selection nudge)
All 5 Crypto-D1 spec docs (protocol + data contract + dataset manifest + qa_freeze_spec + backtest_plan) are read by the runner but NOT modified
All 14 prior validator tools are NOT modified

follows_baseline_backtest_plan.phase_satisfied: P3_baseline_strategy_impl (runner implementation; backtest EXECUTION against real local data is a SEPARATE, operator-triggered step that uses --data-dir + --out-dir)

strategy_families_implemented: volatility_regime_gate (additive filter on Donchian; rolling vol window=30, max_ann_vol=1.50)
strategy_families_skipped_in_v1: mean_reversion (always SKIPPED_WATCH_ONLY in v1; must NOT revive any prior CODR-* parameter set)

how_to_run_with_local_csv_data.step_1_prepare_data: Operator places one or more CSV files under a chosen DATA_DIR. CSVs MUST have the Bundle-12 header columns: timestamp, open, high, low, close, volume, symbol, source, quote_currency. One row per (symbol, UTC daily timestamp). Source venue named in the 'source' column. NO network call is made by the runner; operator is responsible for offline acquisition.
how_to_run_with_local_csv_data.step_5_inspect_reports: OUT_DIR contains: crypto_d1_backtest_report.json and crypto_d1_backtest_report.md. NEVER commit OUT_DIR contents to the repo unless the operator has explicitly authorized that.

what_happens_if_no_data_exists.behavior: The runner emits a FAIL report. assets_seen=[], strategy_results=[], pass_watch_fail_status='FAIL', failures=['missing local data: ...']. JSON and MD reports are still written so the operator has a traceable audit trail. NO synthetic / fabricated metrics are emitted.
what_happens_if_no_data_exists.guarantee: The runner NEVER fabricates research results. If data is missing, the run is BLOCKED at the verdict layer and the operator must acquire data via a separate, operator-authorized P2 path.

what_was_executed_in_this_bundle: ONLY the test suite, against tmp_path synthetic CSV fixtures generated inside the tests. NO real backtest was run on any real Crypto-D1 dataset. The runner is implemented and tested; running it on real data is the operator's separate step.

candidate_registry_status_for_crypto_d1_.registry_NOT_modified_by_this_bundle: The runner is code, not evidence. The candidate_registry seed's extra_files were not extended; lane stays WATCH at 25 source_reports. Promotion to ACTIVE requires a future per-strategy backtest report PASS verdict on REAL data + an explicit operator decision -- not produced by this bundle.
guardrails_held: never STRONG evidence in the auto-build path
no real data files or backtest output files created
no backtest execution against real data

recommended_next_bundle: Crypto-D1 Data Source Evaluation Memo v1 -- written assessment of which offline data sources could later satisfy the QA / freeze spec. Memo only, no fetch. (Spec bundle; Claude works.)

Crypto-D1 Data Collection Authorization Draft -- still spec-only; only if the operator wants to start the path toward an actual P2 acquisition. Does not authorize anything by itself. (Spec bundle; Claude works.)

Operator step (NOT a bundle): operator-supplied offline acquisition of BTC/ETH/SOL daily-spot CSV data into a chosen DATA_DIR; then run the runner per the 'how_to_run_with_local_csv_data' steps above and review the emitted JSON+MD report.

Crypto-D1 Backtest Runner v2 (future) -- walk-forward driver + per-family parameter-grid sweep + structured sensitivity sweep + emit per-strategy report.json that matches the FULL 27-field schema declared in Bundle 15. (Code bundle; recommend Codex.)
